name: Pribila & Fields
subject: a quick thought on your intake
body:
Hi there,

Saw Pribila & Fields' contact form has no instant response — someone reaching out at 9pm waits until business hours, and a lot of them call the next firm instead.

I build a system that responds to every inquiry within 60 seconds, 24/7, qualifies them, and gets them scheduled — plus it automatically asks resolved clients for a Google review.

Want me to send over a 2-minute demo so you can see exactly what your clients would experience? Just reply and I'll fire it over.

— Cyrus

body:
